title: Imprescriptibility of the right.
doc_html:
Art. 788.  Imprescriptibility of the right.

The right to compel the fixing of the boundary between contiguous lands is imprescriptible.

Acts 1977, No. 169, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 788.  Imprescriptibility of the right.
The right to compel the fixing of the boundary between contiguous lands is imprescriptible.
Acts 1977, No. 169, §1.
